message:
refactor(codegen): Replace inline type checks with trait functions (batch 4)

Refactor 14 files to use centralized trait functions instead of
inline type pattern matching:

builtins:
- collections.zig: Use container_traits.isList/isTuple, string_traits
- conversions/float_conv.zig: Use string_traits.isString
- conversions/int_conv.zig: Use string_traits.isString
- conversions/str_conv.zig: Use container_traits.isTuple
- conversions/type_checks.zig: Use string_traits, container_traits
- math.zig: Use type_traits.isBoolean

dispatch:
- module_functions.zig: Use type_traits.isBoolean

expressions:
- calls.zig: Use type_traits.isFloating/isIntegral
- operators/arithmetic.zig: Use container_traits, type_traits
- operators/comparison.zig: Use type_traits.isIntegral
- subscript.zig: Use type_traits.isIntegral

statements:
- assign_defer.zig: Use type_traits.isFloating
- control/loops/for_basic.zig: Use type_traits.isBoolean/isFloating
- functions/var_hoisting.zig: Use container_traits.isList
